name: Catan
description: Catan is the modern classic that defined the German-style "Eurogame" — settle a hex-tile island where dice rolls dispense wood, brick, sheep, wheat, and ore each turn. Spend resources to build settlements, roads, and cities; trade ruthlessly with rivals; race to ten victory points before anyone else. The robber, the longest road, the perfect 8-roll: everyone has a Catan story.
